languages.text: {n}Тень воспоминания омрачает лицо Зораэля.{/n} "Знай: некрон умеет подчинять себе волю других. Только сильные духом сопротивляются его контролю".

traits.locale_text: {n}Тень воспоминания омрачает лицо Зораэля.{/n} "Знай: некрон умеет подчинять себе волю других. Только сильные духом сопротивляются его контролю".

languages.text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."
languages.original_text: {n}Тень воспоминания омрачает лицо Зораэля.{/n} "Знай: некрон умеет подчинять себе волю других. Только сильные духом сопротивляются его контролю".

{n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

languages.text: {n}佐拉尔的神情因一段回忆而短暂黯淡。{/n}“记住：那个太空死灵擅长控制他人意志。唯有意志坚定之人，才能抵抗他的控制。”
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}佐拉尔的神情因一段回忆而短暂黯淡。{/n}“记住：那个太空死灵擅长控制他人意志。唯有意志坚定之人，才能抵抗他的控制。”

languages.text: {n}La sombra del recuerdo cruza el rostro de Zorael.{/n} «Debes saber esto: el Necrón es experto en subyugar las voluntades ajenas. Solo los fuertes de espíritu pueden resistirse a su control».
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}La sombra del recuerdo cruza el rostro de Zorael.{/n} «Debes saber esto: el Necrón es experto en subyugar las voluntades ajenas. Solo los fuertes de espíritu pueden resistirse a su control».

languages.text: {n}L'ombre d'un souvenir traverse le visage de Zorael.{/n} « Retenez bien ceci : le Nécron a la capacité de subjuguer la volonté d'autrui. Seuls les esprits forts peuvent échapper à son contrôle. »
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'ombre d'un souvenir traverse le visage de Zorael.{/n} « Retenez bien ceci : le Nécron a la capacité de subjuguer la volonté d'autrui. Seuls les esprits forts peuvent échapper à son contrôle. »

languages.text: {n}Zorael'in yüzünden bir anının gölgesi geçiyor.{/n} "Şunu bil: Nekron, başkalarının iradesine boyun eğdirme konusunda yeteneklidir. Yalnızca ruhu güçlü olanlar onun kontrolüne direnebilir."
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael'in yüzünden bir anının gölgesi geçiyor.{/n} "Şunu bil: Nekron, başkalarının iradesine boyun eğdirme konusunda yeteneklidir. Yalnızca ruhu güçlü olanlar onun kontrolüne direnebilir."

languages.text: {n}Der Schatten einer Erinnerung huscht über Zoraels Gesicht.{/n} "Wisset dies: Der Necron versteht sich darauf, den Willen anderer Leute zu brechen. Nur ein starker Geist kann sich seiner Kontrolle entziehen."
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Schatten einer Erinnerung huscht über Zoraels Gesicht.{/n} "Wisset dies: Der Necron versteht sich darauf, den Willen anderer Leute zu brechen. Nur ein starker Geist kann sich seiner Kontrolle entziehen."

languages.text: {n}ゾラエルの顔に記憶の影が漂う。{/n}「知っておいてほしい。ネクロは他者の意志を支配することに長けている。精神の強さを持つ者だけが彼の支配に抵抗できるのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The shadow of a memory passes over Zorael's face.{/n} "Know this: the Necron is skilled at subjugating the will of others. Only those strong in spirit can resist his control."

traits.locale_text: {n}ゾラエルの顔に記憶の影が漂う。{/n}「知っておいてほしい。ネクロは他者の意志を支配することに長けている。精神の強さを持つ者だけが彼の支配に抵抗できるのだ。」
